transcript_batch: with calm authority. It wasn't just a broadcaster, it was a voice of reassurance. By the 1990s, as liberalization transformed India's economy, FM radio emerged as a powerful medium. Even as private radio channels mushroomed, All India Radio remained unique, balancing its role as an entertainer and educator. It ensured that every voice was heard and every story told.
